title: Trial begins in Kabul airport attack; defense says U.S. ‘got the wrong man’
description: Federal prosecutors allege Mohammad Sharifullah helped orchestrate the 2021 bombing by scouting out a potential route for the suicide bomber on behalf of ISIS-K.

title: Here are the results for Virginia's 2026 redistricting ballot measure
description: Live election results: Get the latest on Virginia's special election on redistricting.

title: Trump’s statements on Iran increasingly contradict each other
description: The president has made conflicting comments on questions both large and small related to the war.

title: House Ethics panel makes rare request for information on sexual misconduct
description: The rare move comes after recent scandals raised questions from lawmakers and others about how Congress handles investigations involving its members.

title: ActBlue, Democratic fundraising engine, faces lawsuit over foreign donations
description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (R) alleged in the lawsuit that ActBlue misled Congress and the public about its donor vetting process.

title: Trump's labor secretary resigns amid investigation into misconduct
description: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who was under internal investigation, is leaving her position. She becomes the third cabinet departure of President Trump's second term.

title: How Trump manages relations with allies
description: NPR's Juana Summers talks with Richard Haass, president emeritus of the Council on Foreign Relations, about how President Trump treats U.S. allies, and how allies like Canada are responding.

title: Democrat in key race defended guns after mass shooting and insulted Kaepernick
description: Bob Brooks, a firefighter who appeals to the White working class, engaged with right-wing content. His endorsers in the Pennsylvania House race stand by him.

title: What a candidate’s old Facebook posts tell us about this moment for Democrats
description: The Washington Post’s essential guide to power and influence in D.C.

title: Uncertainty reigns at DOJ in the aftermath of Bondi’s departure
description: Acting attorney general Todd Blanche has moved quickly to put his stamp on the department, but other Trump loyalists also appear to be vying for leading roles.

title: KitKat, Gatorade or granola bars? What’s banned under new SNAP rules is mixed.
description: Many GOP states are enacting soda and candy bans for food stamp purchases amid MAHA’s healthy food efforts. Some retailers and SNAP users find the new rules complicated.

title: Supreme Court justices turn children’s books into big paydays
description: The trend is fueled by their status as political celebrities in a deeply divided country.

title: Who owns presidential records? Trump's Justice Department says it's him
description: The Trump administration asserts that a nearly 50-year-old law requiring the preservation of presidential records is unconstitutional. Historians warn important papers could be destroyed.

title: Voters say they feel confused and misled on Virginia's redistricting vote
description: Contradictory election mailers, conflicting TV ads and vague wording on the ballot have Virginia voters saying that the campaigns on either side of the redistricting vote are muddying the waters.

title: DOJ demands Detroit-area 2024 ballots, escalating election scrutiny
description: DOJ official Harmeet K. Dhillon wrote that she is seeking ballots to investigate election law compliance. Democratic state officials call the request baseless.

title: In Virginia, redistricting vote could give Democrats an edge ahead of midterms
description: Voting ends Tuesday in Virginia on a ballot measure that would lead to a new congressional map for the state. These new districts could provide Democrats a big boost ahead of the midterms.

title: Trump’s fixation on White House ballroom is increasing, Post analysis finds
description: The president has publicly highlighted his ballroom project on roughly a third of the days this year.

title: Politics chat: Trump loses support of voters over war and high gas prices
description: Between the war in Iran and high gas prices, President Trump needs to regain the voters' confidence ahead of the November midterm elections.

title: U.S. seizes Iranian cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
description: The U.S. has taken custody of an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz after firing on its engine room, President Trump said in a post on social media.

title: Businesses race to apply for tariff refunds
description: Exactly two months after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Trump's tariffs, businesses that paid those levies began requesting refunds Monday.

title: Trump signs order fast tracking review of psychedelics for mental health disorders
description: President endorses psilocybin and ibogaine: "Can I have some, please?"
